RemediationStrings.Title: AutoConnectAllowedOEM (Wi-Fi Settings)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Microsoft\WcmSvc\wifinetworkmanager\config\AutoConnectAllowedOEM must be 0. Severity: Medium. Category: Wi-Fi Settings.

RemediationStrings.Title: fBlockNonDomain (Wi-Fi Settings)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\WcmSvc\GroupPolicy\fBlockNonDomain must be 1. Severity: Medium. Category: Wi-Fi Settings.
